news.title: China tightens indium export checks as AI demand increases

news.title: Satya Nadella Has Positioned Microsoft to Grow. Investors Are Missing the Point.
news.summary: When Satya Nadella became  Microsoft  CEO in 2014, the software company was stuck in the mud. Nadella, 58, regained investor confidence with a shift to the cloud and a less cutthroat culture.
